overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, exploring a dimly lit industrial warehouse and makeshift living quarters. The player moves through cluttered storage areas into an inhabited space with NPCs interacting, watching television, and working on equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow storage room with stacked crates

events.description: exiting dark storage room into slightly brighter industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through a cramped storage room toward an exit doorway

tall metal shelving unit against the back wall
doorway leading out of the storage room into industrial area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark, narrow storage room with wooden crates stacked on the left. The player moves forward toward a doorway, exiting the dimly lit space into a slightly brighter industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse with debris and trash piles

events.description: entering large industrial warehouse area from narrow storage room

dark metal workbench with items scattered on top

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide industrial warehouse space with exposed pipes overhead. The area is cluttered with trash bags, fallen traffic barrels, and metal workbenches. The lighting has a greenish industrial tint.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial living quarters with kitchen area and NPCs

events.description: entering inhabited area with visible characters and living amenities

character standing with arms crossed near a workbench

entered.detail: long counter with cabinets and kitchen equipment underneath
bright green hard-shell suitcase stacked on wooden crates
network of industrial pipes and ventilation ducts on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the warehouse, the space transitions to an inhabited living area with a kitchen counter, television, and scattered furniture. Two characters are visible - one sitting on the counter and another standing nearby. A bright green suitcase sits prominently on crates to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: living quarters with characters watching television and working

events.description: slowing down to observe characters and television screen
character on right bends over to search through a red toolbox

agents.ego_description: moving slowly past the characters, observing the television and their activities

notable_agents.action: character sitting on counter drinking from a bottle and watching TV
character bending over searching through a red toolbox

entered.detail: large red metal toolbox with multiple drawers that the character is searching
posters and notices on the corrugated metal wall behind the characters

segments.scene_description: The player slows down to observe the living area where characters are engaged in various activities - one watching television advertisements for Biotechnica while drinking, and another rummaging through a red toolbox. The camera moves past them, revealing more of the cluttered industrial living space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit corner with seated character and barred window

events.description: turning left to face corner with seated character

agents.ego_description: turning toward a dark corner where another character is seated on the floor

notable_agents.action: character sitting on the floor in the corner examining something in their hands

entered.detail: window with metal bars showing neon lights from outside
mattress or cushion on the floor with debris scattered around it

segments.scene_description: The player turns left toward a darker corner of the room, revealing a character sitting on the floor near a barred window with neon light filtering through. The area contains a discarded mattress and scattered personal belongings, suggesting a makeshift sleeping area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic storage room into a sprawling, inhabited industrial warehouse. It begins in a dark, narrow space flanked by wooden crates, moving forward through a doorway into a brighter corridor with a greenish industrial tint. As the camera enters the main warehouse, the environment opens up to reveal exposed overhead pipes and a cluttered floor of trash bags and metal workbenches before transitioning into a makeshift living area. The scene then shifts toward a domestic hub where characters lounge by a kitchen counter and watch Biotechnica advertisements on a television, passing a bright green suitcase and a red toolbox. Finally, the camera turns toward a dim corner of the room, revealing a makeshift sleeping area with a discarded mattress and a character sitting by a barred window filtered with neon light.
